query:
SELECT m.id, m.course_id, m.title_ar, m.title_en, COUNT(q.id) as current_count
FROM modules m
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.module_id = m.id
GROUP BY m.id, m.course_id, m.title_ar, m.title_en
ORDER BY m.course_id, m.id;
command:

FROM modules m
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.module_id = m.id

ORDER BY m.course_id, m.id;
